title: Westland Bonsai Tree Feed Concentrate, 200 ml
features: Easy measuring dozer to ensure correct application.
Balanced formula enriched with essential nutrients and trace elements.
Helps bonsai trees grow healthy with a rich green leaf colour and Strong roots.
description: From the manufacturer Westland Bonsai Feed Concentrate Westland Bonsai Concentrate Feed is a balanced formula enriched with the essential nutrients and trace elements that bonsai need to thrive. It helps them grow healthy and strong with a rich green leaf colour and strong roots. Use the easy to measure doser for the best results. Key Benefits Contains essential nutrients to develop strong root & stem systems Reduces excessive top growth With easy squeeze measure dosing cap Westland Bonsai Feed Concentrate Why Use? Feeding your Bonsai Trees couldn’t be couldn’t be easier. Westland Bonsai Feed Concentrate features an easy to use dosing cap that allows you to simply get the right amount of feed into the dosing chamber, without the fear of overdosing. When to Use Feed every second watering during the growing season (Spring/Summer.) In winter, use every fourth watering as bonsai will require fewer nutrients. How to Use 1. Remove the cap 2. Hold the bottle upright and gently squeeze the bottle to fill the dosing chamber and release. The doser will remove any excess plant food, leaving a 5ml dose in the chamber. 3. Add the feed to 1 Litre of water and mix. 4. Avoid overdosing and applying to foliage. Handy Tips It’s best to keep Bonsai out of draughts and away from intense heat. Spraying with water at room temperature twice a week and sponging the leaves occasionally to remove dust is also recommended. Nip branches back when they begin to grow otherwise pruning cuts will show up in the wood and will become noticeable.
